metadata.description: Marketplace for the minigame-assets plugin — an AI-powered game asset generation workflow built on the minigame-assets-mcp server.

plugins.name: minigame-assets
plugins.description: Generate game assets (sprites, characters, weapons, backgrounds, UI, logos, thumbnails, music, video) with a CONCEPT-first AI workflow. Bundles the minigame-assets-mcp server, 3 slash commands, and an auto-triggered workflow skill.
